text: I've been a bit tired and anxious about it, wanted to get checked.
label: gastroenteritis/discharge

text: My breathing is really laboured. Chest pain, high fever, can't stop coughing up phlegm. 9 day(s), deteriorating, though I think I'm slowly getting better. I'm burning up.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: Productive cough and slightly short of breath climbing stairs. 5 day(s) like this. I have a very high fever.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: Just a touch of flu I think — mild fever, a bit of tiredness, dry throat. 3 day(s), and I feel more unwell than yesterday.
label: influenza/mild

text: Fever on and off, drenched in sweat, can't get out of bed. This has gone on 2 day(s), and nothing is improving — I'm very worried.
label: influenza/mild

text: Just a touch of flu I think — mild fever, a bit of tiredness, dry throat. 3 day(s).
label: influenza/moderate

text: My chest really hurts when I cough or take a deep breath. Quite a bit of phlegm, fever, feeling weak. 9 day(s). I have a very high fever.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: I'm struggling badly to breathe — every breath hurts, coughing up thick dark mucus, high fever. 9 day(s) of this, and it feels like it might be turning a corner. My temperature is really elevated.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: I'm struggling badly to breathe — every breath hurts, coughing up thick dark mucus, high fever. 9 day(s) of this, and it feels like it might be turning a corner. My temperature is really elevated.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: Worsening chest cough with thick mucus, feverish, and quite short of breath. 10 day(s). I'm burning up.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: I can't breathe properly. Severe chest pain, coughing up greenish phlegm, high temperature. 8 day(s) and scared, and it seems to be escalating. I have a very high fever.
label: pneumonia/severe
